title: Harley Keener
content:
{{CharHub|Harley Keener|Harley Keener}} {{Character |image = Harley Keener.png |real name = Harley Keener |species = [[Human]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|USA}} |DOB = [[2002]]-[[2003]]{{Ref|TAoIM3}} |gender = Male |movie = ''[[Iron Man 3]]''
''[[Avengers: Endgame]]'' |book = ''[[Iron Man 3 Read-Along Storybook]]'' |actor = [[Ty Simpkins]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|Admit it, you need me. We're connected.|Harley Keener to [[Tony Stark]]|Iron Man 3}} '''Harley Keener''' is a [[Tennessee]] local who had crossed paths with [[Tony Stark]] when the latter broke into his garage, seeking shelter and food. Keener allied with Stark in his quest to uncover the enigmatic [[Extremis]] program, and prevent the series of associated [[Aldrich Killian's False Flag Attacks|terrorist attacks]] that plagued the [[United States]]. Despite being attacked by [[Eric Savin]], Keener proved to be a useful ally, as he had tended to the [[Iron Man Armor: Mark XLII|Mark XLII Armor]] in Stark's absence and helped track down the [[Trevor Slattery|Mandarin]] in [[Miami]]. Keener and Stark continued to keep in touch, Stark becoming a father figure to Keener. [[2023|Ten years]] after he met him, Keener attended Stark's funeral after Stark sacrificed his life to [[Battle of Earth|defeat]] [[Thanos]] and his forces. ==Biography== ===Early Life=== {{Quote|My mom already left for the diner and dad went to {{WPS|7-Eleven}} to get scratchers. I guess he won because that was six years ago.|Harley Keener|Iron Man 3}} Harley Keener was born in either [[2002]] or [[2003]] and was raised in [[Rose Hill]], [[Tennessee]]. When he was four years old, Harley was abandoned by his father, who left in [[2007]] and never returned, supposedly with the excuse of going to {{WPS|7-Eleven}} to get lottery tickets, leaving him with his mother and younger sister. At school, Keener was a member of the science club at his secondary school. He was frequently bullied by [[E.J.]].{{Ref|IM3}} ===The Mechanic=== ====Meeting Tony Stark==== [[File:HarleywithIronMan-IM3.png|{{AltFloat}}|Keener impressed with the [[Iron Man Armor: Mark XLII|Iron Man Armor]]]] {{Quote|Oh my God! [[Iron Man Armor: Mark XLII|That]]... that's—is that Iron Man?"
"Technically, I am."
"Technically, you're dead.|Harley Keener and [[Tony Stark]]|Iron Man 3}} One night around Christmas, Keener became aware of an intruder in his garage and, armed with a [[Potato Gun: Mark I|potato gun]], accosted the man. The intruder turned out to be [[Tony Stark]], and the unexpected arrival was made even more impressive by the presence of Stark's latest [[Iron Man Armor: Mark XLII|prototype Iron Man armor]]. While discussing Stark's situation, the boy and inventor quickly developed a rapport as Keener agreed to help him. Stark handed him a small non lethal flash grenade to use on his bully in exchange for the parts he needed to repair his suit. [[File:Battle at Rose Hill.png|{{AltFloat}}|Keener is threatened by [[Eric Savin]]]] Once Keener had provided the supplies, he then brought Stark to a location that had been the site of an explosion with a rare thermal signature, and then to [[Mrs. Davis]] whose [[Chad Davis|son]] had been the cause of the event. That meeting did not go as planned, with Stark encountering [[Ellen Brandt]] and [[Eric Savin]], two [[Extremis]]-infused agents also intent on finding the woman. The ensuing [[Battle of Rose Hill|fight]] spilled back outside where Savin encountered Keener and used him as a hostage to ensure Stark's compliance. Keener was able to break free from the situation using the flash grenade that Stark had supplied.{{Ref|IM3}} ====Supervising the Mark XLII==== [[File:Keener-Updates-Stark.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Keener updates [[Iron Man|Tony Stark]]]] {{Quote|So now you're just gonna leave me here? Like my dad?"
"Yup. Wait, you're guilt tripping me, aren't you?|Harley Keener and [[Tony Stark]]|Iron Man 3}} Despite Keener's earlier assistance, [[Tony Stark]] had left him by the roadside while he drove away to pursue the mysteries he was chasing. Keener's persistence in communicating with the inventor had a fortunate outcome while the two were in telephone communication. He snapped Stark out of an anxiety attack by pointing out that Stark's nature was to be a mechanic, and therefore he should simply build something. That gave Stark renewed focus and drew him back to Keener's garage to improvise a new series of gadgets with which to give him an edge while his armor was out of commission.{{Ref|IM3}} ====Present from the Mechanic==== [[File:IM3-789547.png|{{AltFloat}}|Keener receives several gifts from [[Tony Stark]]]] When [[Tony Stark]] left to continue his vendetta, Keener was left to continue his mundane life. Not long after the encounter with the wayward mechanic, Keener came home from school to find his garage packed with new equipment, from computers to robotics, and was overjoyed. On a table was a more personal gift with a placard that read, "Potato Gun Mark II" and regards from "[[Iron Man|The Mechanic]]."{{Ref|IM3}} ===Tony Stark's Funeral=== [[File:Harley Keener (2023).png|{{AltFloat}}|Keener attends [[Tony Stark]]'s funeral]] In [[2023]], Keener, who was now a young man, attended [[Tony Stark]]'s funeral at Stark's [[Stark Eco-Compound|house]] in [[New York]]. He stood in the back behind the [[Avengers]] and their allies.{{Ref|AE}} {{Clear}} ==Abilities== {{Quote|I would have added in, um, the retro..."
"Retro-reflective panels?"
"To make [[Iron Man Armor: Mark XLII|him]] stealth mode.|Harley Keener and [[Tony Stark]]|Iron Man 3}} *'''Engineer''': [[File:HarleyKeener-FirstScene.jpg|thumb|250px|Keener with his [[Potato Gun: Mark I|Potato Gun]]]] Keener was able to build himself a [[Potato Gun: Mark I|Potato Gun]] at a very young age. It even impressed [[Tony Stark]] who gave him a better [[Potato Gun: Mark II|version]] as a gift for helping him. *'''Marksman''': Despite his young age, Keener has some skill in marksmanship. He accurately shot a potato at a glass bottle with his potato gun during his first encounter with [[Tony Stark]] and during the [[Battle of Rose Hill]], Keener accurately threw a snowball at [[Eric Savin]] to prevent him from shooting Stark. ==Equipment== {{Quote|Nice potato gun. Barrel's a little long. Between that and the wide gauge, it's gonna diminish your FPS.|[[Tony Stark]] to Harley Keener|Iron Man 3}} *'''[[Potato Gun: Mark I|Potato Gun]]''': Keener used a homemade potato gun that he had made in his garage when he first encountered and confronted [[Tony Stark]], shooting a potato at a glass bottle to prove the accuracy of the gun to Stark. He was later provided an upgraded version of the gun dubbed "[[Potato Gun: Mark II|Mark II]]" by Stark. ==Facilities== *'''[[Keener Residence]]''': As a child, Keener lived at the [[Tennessee]] house. When [[Tony Stark]] crashed in [[Rose Hill]] after his [[Tony Stark's Mansion|mansion]] was [[Destruction of Tony Stark's Mansion|destroyed]] he broke into the family garage and met Keener. He made a deal with Stark to allow him access to the garage and several other resources in exchange for a weapon to fend off bullies. When Stark left to find and stop the [[Aldrich Killian|Mandarin]], Keener stayed in the garage to supervise the charging of the [[Iron Man Armor: Mark XLII|Mark XLII]]. ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Family=== *Father *Mother *Sister ===Allies=== *[[Iron Man|Tony Stark/Iron Man]] † - Idol and Friend *[[J.A.R.V.I.S.]] *[[Mrs. Davis]] {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[E.J.]] - Bully *[[Eric Savin]] † - Kidnapper {{Col-end}} ==Trivia== *Harley Keener is the first child to be a main character in the [[Marvel Cinematic Universe]]. ==Behind the Scenes== *Harley Keener was created by [[Shane Black]], who pitched the idea of a superhero running into a little kid in heartland America, a decision which [[Robert Downey Jr.]] opined to be "a wise choice and a calculated risk" to the storyline of ''[[Iron Man 3]]''.[https://www.reuters.com/article/entertainment-us-ironman3/iron-man-3-goes-back-to-basics-in-a-quest-to-save-the-u-s-idUSBRE93M0Z520130423 "Iron Man 3" goes back to basics in a quest to save the U.S.] *At the suggestion of the production executive [[Chris Fenton]], Harley Keener was at one point considered to be made a Chinese exchange student whose father transferred to the U.S. for business reasons. Fenton wanted the character to act as an homage to then upcoming leader Xi Jinping in the hopes that it will be "the ultimate cultural bridge between the world's only two superpowers". The idea was shot down because it "[felt] like an infomercial for China".[https://bleedingcool.com/movies/iron-man-3-kid-could-have-been-chinese-to-flatter-xi-jinping/ The Iron Man 3 Kid Could Have Been Chinese, To Flatter Xi Jinping] *While preparing for his return in ''[[Avengers: Endgame]]'', Simpkins stated, "I didn’t get a script, but [the directors] came up to me and were like just think about what Tony meant to you and how he impacted your character’s life and your life. So I just thought about what I said earlier, how Iron Man is very sentimental to me and how he felt to Harley. I imagine Tony was really Harley’s only father figure and that they would’ve stayed in touch over the years. I just kind of took that sentimental part of my real life and Harley’s life into the scene."[https://www.cinemablend.com/news/2474245/iron-man-3-star-reveals-what-harley-was-thinking-in-avengers-endgame-funeral-scene Iron Man 3 Star Reveals What Harley Was Thinking In Avengers: Endgame Funeral Scene] *[[Emily Brobst]] was a stunt double for [[Ty Simpkins]] in the role of Harley Keener. ==References== {{Gallery|Harley Keener/Gallery}} {{Wq|Harley Keener}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} [[ru:Харли Кинер]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Iron Man 3 Characters]] [[Category:Avengers: Endgame Characters]] [[Category:Book Characters]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Brown Hair]] [[Category:Blue Eyes]] [[Category:Students]]
